items.title: Russia expels British diplomat over spying allegations
items.dek: A UK Foreign Office spokesman accused Russia of an "aggressive and co-ordinated campaign of harassment against British diplomats".
items.body: A UK Foreign Office spokesman accused Russia of an "aggressive and co-ordinated campaign of harassment against British diplomats".
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Russian oil tanker reaches Cuba after Trump appears to loosen blockade
items.dek: The tanker has reached Cuban waters just hours after Donald Trump said he had "no problem" with it arriving.
items.body: The tanker has reached Cuban waters just hours after Donald Trump said he had "no problem" with it arriving.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Fuel rations and free buses: How countries are responding to rising oil prices
items.dek: Governments around the world have introduced measures to limit the impact of price increases.
items.body: Governments around the world have introduced measures to limit the impact of price increases.
items.author: IriLine Desk
